creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Updating GCC_DEFAULT from GCC 10 to GCC 11 is blocked by the fact that building this port with GCC 11 gives the following error (full log in URL):

!!! build failure encountered !!!
                                                         10482,1       Fon

 1288 |                 'Avector 2', Model % Materials(k) % Values, Pn, Element % NodeIndexes )
      |                                                                                       2
......
 1452 |         DO i=1,MIN(3,SIZE(Hwrk,1))
      |                                  1
Error: Index variable 'i' redefined at (1) in procedure 'inputvector' called from within DO loop at (2)
*** [fem/src/modules/CMakeFiles/DCRComplexSolve.dir/DCRComplexSolve.F90.o] Error code 1

Also, please check that USE_GCC is still needed and that the default clang compier can't be used instead.
